---
name: Register new PURL type (draft)
about: Document requirements to register a new PURL type
title: 'Register new PURL type: '
labels: Proposed new type
assignees: ''

---

This is an issue template for registering a new PURL type. Registration is our name for the process to create a new PURL type.  See https://www.packageurl.org/docs/purl/purl-types for general information about the process.

To request registration of a new PURL **type** you should be able to able to explain:
- [ ] Why is this new PURL **type** needed?
- [ ] What input do you have from the relevant package ecosystem/community?
- [ ] What are the open questions about this new PURL **type**?
- [ ] What are the PURL component level definitions?

A draft PR may be a good way to document the PURL component level definitions, but a PR is not a substitute for an issue because the issue should be the primary forum for discussion.
